7 read-only integration tests pass against real YNAB (get_budgets, get_accounts, get_account_balance, get_transactions, get_transactions+since_date, get_transactions_needing_attention, get_categories). Split server.py 763→99 lines into focused modules (client.py, formatters.py, state.py, resources.py, tools/budgeting.py, tools/transactions.py). All 42 unit tests pass; 9 integration tests collect cleanly; CLI launches; 10 tools + 2 resources register; 100% docstring coverage maintained. Tool modules access patched names via server.X for monkeypatch compatibility — rule documented in bd memory.
